title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: Jeff Su explains that Claude Cowork requires outcome-first language describing end results rather than task-first step-by-step prompting used in Claude Chat. He contrasts the two approaches with examples showing that Cowork autonomously completes file organization tasks while Chat provides recommendations that users execute manually.
